title: orchis × beyrichii nothosubsp. mackaensis
intro: Orchis × beyrichii nothosubsp. mackaensis is a hybrid orchid plant, a cross between Orchis mascula and Orchis militaris, native to Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the heart and improve circulation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Orchis × beyrichii nothosubsp. mackaensis include its potential to treat cardiovascular issues, such as high blood pressure and heart failure, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to create tinctures and other preparations.
